payload.news_summary: The most substantive signal in this news set is a regulatory headwind in Ireland/UK where new rules are causing Domino's text messages to be labeled as 'likely spam,' potentially degrading the effectiveness of a key CRM and promotional channel. The Q1 2025 earnings call tone was only mildly positive (0.17), suggesting limited management confidence in forward momentum. The vast majority of headlines are noise — unrelated to DPZ fundamentals — making high-confidence revision calls impossible from this dataset alone.
